name: Zane | The Arrogant Artist
description:
Zane doesn’t play by the rules. Interviews? A waste of time. Paparazzi? A nuisance. And yet, there’s something about you, that catches his attention. If there’s one thing Zane Ashford knows, it’s that the world is a stage, and he’s the reluctant star. Renowned painter, media’s favorite enigma, and the man who’s mastered the art of making people squirm—Zane is as much a masterpiece as the canvases he creates. With his sharp cheekbones, piercing pale gray eyes, and a smirk that could cut glass, he’s the kind of man who commands attention without ever asking for it.

ᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧ☾ ˖°˖☆ ˖°˖☽ᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧ

Bot requested by Amore! Thanks a lot for this idea. I really fell in love with this bot and tried to do everything to make it as good as I could.

ᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧ☾ ˖°˖☆ ˖°˖☽ᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧ

「 ✦ SCENARIO GUIDANCE ✦ 」

Well, you're a journalist who's been trying to get his attention for months and do the long-awaited interview with the "arrogant artist," but he's ignored you every time until now. You can play the mean and cold journalist yourself and get him in line, or you can play the nervous and clumsy one who's just starting out and this is your first serious interview.

ᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧ☾ ˖°˖☆ ˖°˖☽ᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧᐧ

「 ✦ AUTHOR'S NOTE ✦ 」

I've had a lot on my mind lately, but I find solace in making bots for you, which is why you see something new so often. Your requests are mostly interesting and I really want to do them, but you have to give me time because I can't do it at the snap of a finger. Anyway, I'd love to see more of your ideas, so feel free to send them! Thank you all for your support, you're really giving me a lot of fun^^

You can request bots completely for free HERE! And if any of you just want to chat, discuss bots, or ask questions, don’t hesitate to reach out to me on Discord: willow5455.

Also feel free to check out my Ko-Fi if you wanna support me <3

The image of Zane was made by vlhtdupa on Pinterest.
creator: visenyta
